metadata.description: Frankencoin is a collateral-backed stablecoin (ZCHF) pegged to the Swiss Franc, where users open positions by depositing collateral (WBTC, wstETH, cbBTC, LsETH, and others) via the MintingHub to mint ZCHF. All core protocol contracts are immutable with no admin upgrade keys. The system relies on a challenge mechanism for liquidations, a reserve pool (Equity/FPS) holding $14.81M, and StablecoinBridges to XCHF and VCHF for fiat-backed redemption. Chainlink CCIP infrastructure provides cross-chain bridging with burn/mint capabilities on the ZCHF token.

admins.name: MintingHub (Legacy)
admins.description: Older immutable MintingHub no longer actively used for new positions. Retains minter permissions on the Frankencoin token but most functions are marked as not called from this contract. Residual collateral in legacy positions: $0.

admins.name: StablecoinBridge (XCHF)
admins.description: Immutable bridge contract that enables 1:1 minting of ZCHF by depositing XCHF (CryptoFranc) and burning ZCHF to redeem XCHF. Minting is capped at 10M ZCHF and has an expiration date. The bridge holds negligible XCHF as it is largely deprecated.

admins.name: PositionRoller
admins.description: Immutable utility contract that allows position holders to roll their collateral into new positions. Uses flash loan mechanics (mint then burn within the same transaction) on the Frankencoin token. No direct capital exposure as operations are atomic.

admins.name: MintingHub (Current)
admins.description: Immutable contract that serves as the primary entry point for opening collateral positions, cloning existing positions, initiating challenges, and processing bids. Controls Frankencoin minting and burning functions on behalf of position holders. Each new position requires a 1000 ZCHF opening fee and collateral deposit. Total collateral locked in positions: $69.27M.

admins.name: Zero Address (Renounced)
admins.description: Renounced permission on CryptoFranc (XCHF). The acceptOwnership and migrateFrom functions are assigned to the zero address, meaning these capabilities are permanently disabled.

admins.name: Equity (FPS Reserve Pool)
admins.description: Immutable reserve pool contract that holds the protocol's equity buffer. The kamikaze function allows burning FPS tokens to withdraw a proportional share of the reserve, with $14.81M in direct capital exposure. The restructureCapTable function can redistribute shares but is bounded by a value range constraint. This contract is the backstop for the protocol: losses from challenged positions are covered from the reserve.

mitigations.description: Caller must sacrifice their own votes proportionally — budget deducted from caller first, then applied to targets up to that budget
Only callable when system equity < MINIMUM_EQUITY (1000 ZCHF) — system must be near-insolvent
Caller must be qualified FPS holder with 2% quorum of total votes (via checkQualified with helpers)

admins.name: VNXCToken Implementation
admins.description: The implementation contract behind the VCHF (VNX Franc) EIP-1967 proxy. Controls administrative functions on VNXCToken including minter role assignment, asset protection, transfer provider changes, minting, burning, freezing, and pausing. This is an external dependency operated by the VNX team, not a Frankencoin-controlled admin.

dependencies.name: VNX Franc (VCHF)
dependencies.description: ERC-20 stablecoin issued by VNX, used as collateral in the StablecoinBridge (VCHF) for 1:1 ZCHF minting. The token is upgradeable via an EIP-1967 proxy controlled by VNXProxyAdmin, and its owner (VNXManager) can mint, burn, freeze, and pause transfers. Total funds at risk through the VCHF bridge: $522.77K.

dependencies.name: Chainlink RBACTimelock (ARMProxy)
dependencies.description: Chainlink timelock (3-hour minimum delay) that owns the ARMProxy contract. Can transfer ARMProxy ownership and replace its implementation. Operated by Chainlink's role-based access control system.

dependencies.name: VNX Proxy Admin
dependencies.description: Proxy admin for the VCHF (VNXCToken) EIP-1967 proxy. Can upgrade the VCHF token implementation and change the admin. Owned by an EOA (0x7B0C...9403), giving VNX full control over the VCHF token contract.

dependencies.name: CryptoFranc (XCHF)
dependencies.description: ERC-20 Swiss Franc stablecoin used as collateral in the StablecoinBridge (XCHF) for 1:1 ZCHF minting. Owned by a 3/4 XCHF multisig that can pause, migrate, and reassign minter roles. The bridge is largely deprecated with negligible XCHF holdings.

dependencies.description: Chainlink Active Risk Management proxy used by PositionRoller and MintingHub for cross-chain risk checks. Called during position rolling and cloning operations. Owned by a Chainlink RBACTimelock with a 3-hour minimum delay.

dependencies.name: XCHF Owner 3/4 Multisig
dependencies.description: 3-of-4 multisig that owns the CryptoFranc (XCHF) token. Can transfer ownership, pause/unpause the token, assign new minters, and initiate token migrations. Operated by the XCHF team.

dependencies.name: XCHF Minter 3/6 Multisig
dependencies.description: 3-of-6 multisig with minting rights on the CryptoFranc (XCHF) token. Can mint new XCHF tokens, which could indirectly affect the StablecoinBridge if minted XCHF is used to mint ZCHF.

dependencies.name: XCHF Operator 3/6 Multisig
dependencies.description: 3-of-6 multisig with operator rights on the CryptoFranc (XCHF) token. Can announce rollovers and refund foreign tokens accidentally sent to the contract.

dependencies.name: Chainlink TransferReference
dependencies.description: Chainlink CCIP contract that holds minter permissions on the Frankencoin token including registerPosition, mint, mintWithReserve, burnFrom, burnWithoutReserve, burnWithReserve, burnFromWithReserve, coverLoss, and collectProfits. All functions are marked as not called from this contract.

dependencies.name: Chainlink RBACTimelock (RMNRemote)
dependencies.description: Chainlink timelock (3-hour minimum delay) that owns the RMNRemote contract. Can configure the Risk Management Network, curse/uncurse chains, and transfer ownership. Part of Chainlink's CCIP security infrastructure.

funds.name: Equity (FPS Reserve Pool)
funds.description: Protocol reserve pool that backs the ZCHF stablecoin. Holds $14.81M primarily in ZCHF, serving as the loss-absorption buffer for challenged and liquidated positions. FPS token holders have a proportional claim on this reserve.

funds.name: MintingHub V2 (Collateral Positions)
funds.description: Current MintingHub with $69.27M locked across 51 collateral positions including WBTC, cbBTC, wstETH, LsETH, BOSS, PAXG, XAUt, and other assets. This represents the majority of protocol collateral.

funds.name: Savings (Current)
funds.description: Current savings contract holding $9.94M in deposited ZCHF from users earning interest on their stablecoin holdings.

funds.name: StablecoinBridge (VCHF)
funds.description: Bridge contract holding $522.77K in VCHF tokens backing ZCHF minted through the 1:1 VCHF-to-ZCHF bridge.

funds.name: MintingHub V1 (Legacy Positions)
funds.description: Legacy MintingHub with $0 remaining in 2 collateral positions (WBTC). Being gradually wound down as positions expire.

funds.name: Savings (Legacy)
funds.description: Legacy savings contract holding $21.59K in residual ZCHF deposits.

funds.name: Frankencoin (ZCHF Token)
funds.description: The ZCHF stablecoin token with a total market capitalization of $35.57M. Immutable ERC-20 with built-in minter registry and reserve accounting.
